subcodes.first_line: The Sun of loving-kindness hath dawned, and the Ocean of the bounty of the Lord of all being is manifest and billowing. How blessed is the state of the soul that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آفتاب عنایت مشرق و بحر جود مالک وجود ظاهر و مواج است نیکو است حال نفسیکه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
